jsonLd.title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at BlueStone
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, BlueStone in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About BlueStone:
BlueStone is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlueStone!
